plugins.name: implement-pipeline
plugins.description: Hands-off /implement pipeline: implement → simplify → lint → verify → review → PR, reusing Claude's built-in skills.

plugins.name: domux-communicate
plugins.description: Message the Claude agent in another domux worktree: domux send/read/peek + the /domux-communicate skill.

plugins.name: domux-start
plugins.description: Kick off a task in a tmux+domux worktree: branch off fresh main, label the session, then start — the /domux-start skill.
